autoPartGrouping.message: Have parts automatically grouped together so that they are printed together on the same job. Configure the range of matching characters to align with a convention you use.
autoPartGrouping.title: Automatic part grouping

tooltips.characterPosition: Specify the character to match relative to the start of the uploaded part name, or the end of uploaded part name. Helpful if order numbers appear at the start or the end of the uploaded part name.
tooltips.characterRange: Specify the number of characters you wish to match.
tooltips.editPermission: You do not have permission to update automatic grouping settings. Ask an Admin or Owner in your organisation to make changes
tooltips.startingCharacterPosition: How many character spaces from the start or the end do you want the range to start at. Helpful if order numbers appear in the middle of a name.

tooltips.rules: Settings that affect how parts and print jobs are processed in your organisation's Funnel.
